#golfswing  #GolfTips #dannymaudegolf Struggling with pitch shots from 30 to 80 yards? That awkward distance that's too far for a chip shot but too short for a full swing is where most golfers drop unnecessary shots every single round — and it's almost always fixable with three simple changes to your golf swing pattern.

Most golf tips for pitching focus on mechanics that make the motion feel more complicated than it needs to be. But when you watch the best players pitch the golf ball, there's nothing complicated happening. Their bodies are stacked, their rhythm is effortless and the club face works with gravity rather than against it. In this golf pitching lesson I want to show you exactly how to recreate that feeling — the same three things I share with every student who comes to me struggling with their short game.

The third technique in this lesson is something a good friend and fellow coach Joe Mayo showed me — and I'll be honest, it completely changed how I think about pitching, chipping and even how to hit irons consistently. If you've been gripping your wedge and trying to lift the ball into the air, this one is going to feel like a revelation.

Aging often shows up in your face first because the face is a sensory organ. Receptors for hormones are highly concentrated in your face because your face shows your emotions. Cortisol can wreak havoc on your skin and facial muscles. 

The platysma muscle has the most significant effect on your face. The facial toning exercises in this video strengthen the platysma, other facial muscles, tendons, ligaments, and fascia around the lower part of the face.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

US viewers: https://us.rickshiels.com

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: The BEST irons that you NEED 👀
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST irons that you NEED 👀 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Winner Takes All: Jokic vs SGA for MVP | GS MoodSwings
videos.summary_source_text:
Winner Takes All: Jokic vs SGA for MVP | GS MoodSwings Welcome back to MoodSwings presented by Landmark Lincoln…your new favorite sports therapy show.

The Denver Nuggets are heating up at exactly the right time, riding a 10-game win streak into the final stretch of the regular season—but the bigger conversation might be happening around Nikola Jokic’s legacy.

On this episode of Mood Swings, Liv breaks down why Jokic is no longer just an MVP candidate, but an undeniable all-time great. From revisiting her 2023 take that Jokic is a top 5 center ever, to challenging the NBA’s obsession with “ring culture,” this episode dives into what actually defines greatness in today’s game.

Plus, the MVP race is coming down to the wire. With Jokic and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander going head-to-head, Liv makes the case for a “winner takes all” showdown between Denver and OKC. Is Jokic leading the hottest team in the league enough? Or does SGA’s dominance on a top-seeded Thunder squad give him the edge?

With the playoffs right around the corner, the Nuggets are finally looking like the team everyone expected at the start of the season. The question is—can they carry this momentum into a deep postseason run?

videos.title: The #1 Collagen Tip for Amazing Hair, Nails, & Skin
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Collagen Tip for Amazing Hair, Nails, & Skin Get access to my FREE resources 👉
https://drbrg.co/4sl4qBy

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Check out this useful tip that can give you better hair, nails, skin, and more!

DATA:
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/20093739/ 
https://openheart.bmj.com/content/1/1/e000103

0:00 Introduction: What is collagen? 
0:26 What is glycine? 
1:10 Glycine and glutathione
1:30 Benefits of glycine
4:26 Glycine deficiency
5:00 Best sources of glycine 
6:35 Can you take too much glycine? 
6:50 How to take glycine
6:55 Why you need glycine

In this video, we’ll discuss a very important amino acid: glycine. Collagen is a main component of connective tissues, tendons, ligaments, and cartilage. About ⅓ of collagen is made by glycine.

Your body can make glycine, but unfortunately, it doesn’t make very much. If you're not getting it from the diet, you could be deficient. Unless you’re eating the skin and cartilage from meat, you’re probably not getting enough glycine.

Glycine is needed to make the most important antioxidant for all of your cells, glutathione. Without enough glycine to make glutathione, you can’t detoxify your body. This can cause a buildup of toxicity, leading to inflammation. 

Glycine is a potent anti-inflammatory agent and is an essential building block for many enzymes and proteins. 

Here are some of the many important functions of glycine:
• Makes heme in your blood
• Important for gum health
• Essential for DNA 
• Building block for catalase 
• Supports sleep
• Supports the liver
• Can help fix a leaky gut
• Detoxifies uric acid
• Supports blood sugar
• Helps with weight loss
• Reduces visceral fat 

Glycine can also turn into glucose to be used as fuel. Certain parts of the body, especially the brain, need a certain amount of glucose. If you’re not consuming glucose, your body can make it. Glycine is a precursor for glucose, but don’t worry about it bumping you out of ketosis. Glycine stimulates the hormone glucagon, which opposes insulin.  

If you’re not eating animals nose-to-tail, if you’re under stress, taking medication, drinking alcohol, or exposed to toxins, you can become deficient in glycine. 

You can increase your glycine intake by consuming gelatin! Try making your own gelatin using Knox Blox and using a natural sweetener like stevia. You can also take a glycine supplement. The average person needs about 4 to 10 grams of glycine per day. 

Bone broth and pork rinds can increase your glycine intake, but you need to consume a lot to get enough glycine.

As we age, we need more glycine. Increasing glycine intake can potentially help people with osteoarthritis, osteoporosis, hair thinning, insomnia, gout, and kidney stones.

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan, and is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.summary_source_text:

#karaage #japanskmat #friteradkyckling #asiatiskmat #streetfood
______________________________

Recept:
Karaage Japansk friterad kyckling 

Karaage är min stora kärlek på tallriken – krispigt, saftigt och oemotståndligt gott! Varje tugga är en perfekt balans mellan det frasiga höljet och den möra kycklingen, med en smak som får mig att le varje gång. Doppa i japansk majonnäs, pressa över lite citron, och jag är i himmelriket, tillbaka i en charmig pub bland tokyos gator och neonljusen. Det är comfort food på högsta nivå – och jag kan aldrig få nog!

30 min
4p
Ingredienser:
800 g kycklinglårfilé eller kycklingsteak 
3 msk ljus sojasås
2 msk mirin
2 tsk riven vitlök
2 tsk riven ingefära 
1 msk sesamolja
Salt 
1 dl maizena
1 dl vetemjöl
1-2L Neutral olja till fritering, rapsolja
Tillbehör:
Japansk majonnäs (t.ex. Kewpie)
Citronklyftor
Finskuren salladslök
Serveras med:
En skål nykokt japanskt ris
En enkel strimlad vitkålsallad

Gör så här:
Skär kycklingen i ca 4x4 cm stora bitar.
Blanda sojasås, mirin, vitlök, ingefära, sesamolja, salt i en skål. Lägg i kycklingen och marinera i minst 15 minuter.
Hetta upp oljan till 170°C i en kastrull eller fritös.
Blanda Mjöl och maizena i en bunke, Ta upp kycklingen ur marinaden och vänd den i mjölblandningen så att den täcks jämnt.
Fritera kycklingen i omgångar i 3-4 minuter tills den är gyllene. Lyft upp och låt rinna av på hushållspapper.
Fritera kycklingen en andra gång i 1-2 minuter för extra krispighet.
Servera med japansk majonnäs, citronklyftor och strö över finhackad salladslök.
Tips: Dubbel fritering gör kycklingen extra krispig!

videos.title: Are supercars POINTLESS? Corvette Z06 v Rivian R1T: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
Are supercars POINTLESS? Corvette Z06 v Rivian R1T: DRAG RACE Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1104

Mat’s flown over to the USA for an American car showdown! 

He’s got his hands on an all-new Rivian R1T Quad Motor, and he’s going up against a Corvette Z06! 

It’s a petrol vs electric head-to-head, but does this colossal all-electric pick-up truck have what it takes to bring down one of the most iconic American sports cars? Let’s take a look at the stats… 

Starting with the Rivian, it’s equipped with four electric motors (one for each wheel), and these combine to produce 1,025hp and 1,624Nm of torque! It comes with launch control, but it also comes with a hefty weight, tipping the scales at 3,170kg! New, it costs from $119,000. 

Then we come to the Corvette. It’s powered by a 5.5-litre naturally-aspirated V8, and this creates 670hp and 625Nm. All this power is sent to the rear wheels via an 8-speed dual-clutch gearbox, and it weighs in at almost half the weight of the Rivian - 1,685kg! A new one of these will have a price tag of around $120,000. 

So they both cost around the same, but that’s about where the similarities between these end! So, which do you think will snatch the win? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE! 

Thanks to everyone who helped set up this race: 
- Jesse Iwuji: https://www.instagram.com/jesse_iwuji/
- Santa Margarita Ranch: https://www.instagram.com/santa.margarita.ranch/
- Rugged Radios: https://www.instagram.com/ruggedradios/ Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1104

videos.title: Han varnade för Hitler
videos.summary_source_text:
Han varnade för Hitler 00:00 Start
00:40 Opinion mot Nazityskland
03:20 Segerstedt och Norge
04:08 Invasionen 1940
07:27 Segerstedt ett problem för regeringen
08:40 Tyska järnvägstransporter genom Sverige
10:08 Statlig censur
11:14 Freden 1945

Krig i Norden:
Under andra världskriget befann sig Norge och Sverige i helt olika situationer. I april 1940 invaderades Norge av Nazityskland, medan Sverige lyckades hålla sig utanför kriget. Den svenska regeringen tvingades till eftergifter för att inte också Sverige skulle utsättas för en tysk invasion. En av de skarpaste kritikerna av Nazityskland och den svenska regeringens undfallenhet var Torgny Segerstedt, redaktör för Göteborgs Handels- och Sjöfarts-Tidning (GHT).

Flera gånger under kriget togs tidningen i beslag för att undvika att provocerande artiklar publicerades. Klagomål på GHT kom till och med från riksminister Hermann Göring. GHT smugglades in i Norge och blev en inspirationskälla för den norska kampen mot ockupationsmakten. Själv inspirerades Torgny Segerstedt av Norges kung Haakon VII, som ledde den norska exilregeringen från England.

Filmen är en del av serien "Tusen år av norsk historia i Göteborgsområdet", som lyfter fram de historiska banden mellan Norge och västra Sverige. Filmprojektet är en officiell del av Nasjonaljubileet 2030 - Norge i tusen år, ett jubileum som synliggör Norges historia, kultur och gemensamma nordiska arv.

Detta avsnitt berättar om en utmanande tid, då världskrig och storpolitik fick återverkningar i Norden. En skarp röst från Göteborg blev både hatad och beundrad.

videos.title: The Most Overlooked Turn In Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
The Most Overlooked Turn In Hockey The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

Anthropic just revealed "Claude Mythos", a model so powerful and so good at hacking that they’ve decided it’s too dangerous to release to the public.

Because of the unprecedented potential of this model, Anthropic is keeping it under lock and key, only granting access to a few elite security teams via "Project Glasswing."

Is this the end of software security as we know it, or the beginning of a new AI-driven defense era?

videos.title: Grok 5: The 6 Trillion Parameter AI That Could Change Everything
videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 5: The 6 Trillion Parameter AI That Could Change Everything 👉 Try BlueStacks AI: https://bluestacks.ai/

Elon Musk has publicly suggested that xAI’s Grok 5 could have a real chance of reaching Artificial General Intelligence (AGI)—a bold claim that has sparked intense debate across the AI industry. In this video, we break down everything you need to know about Grok 5, including its rumored six trillion parameters, Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture, massive context window, and the Colossus 2 supercomputer powering its training.

We also explore how Grok 5 compares with leading AI models like GPT, Gemini, and Claude, analyze its expected timeline, and discuss the significant safety concerns following earlier Grok incidents. Whether you're a developer, business leader, or AI enthusiast, this video provides a clear and balanced perspective on one of the most ambitious AI projects ever attempted.

videos.title: Quiet Woodworking In The Swedish Wilderness
videos.summary_source_text:
Quiet Woodworking In The Swedish Wilderness New batch of my own cutting boards is finally available:
https://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

All of the beams for the outdoor kitchen are completed in this video. In the next one, I’ll burn them and raise the full structure! Something I’ve really been looking forward to. I also cook a traditional Swedish dish called “raggmunk”, a potato pancake with extra crisp only achievable with the high heat possible in a carbon steel pan.

I’m using my pans from Kockums Jernverk, made in Sweden from high-quality Swedish steel. They create a natural non-stick surface and work just as well over an open fire as they do in your kitchen. Built to last a lifetime, they’re one of the most affordable choices you can make in the long run.
It’s craftsmanship I truly believe in, made with the same values I stand for. I’m proud to represent them.

Get the same pan here:
👉 https://www.kockumsjernverk.se/sv/kolstalsstekpannor/stekpanna-o28-cm

P.S. I might have added the leather belt seen in the video to my website 😉

Thank you all for watching my videos, it means the world and thank you Stevie Antoniou for helping me edit my videos!

🌳🪵 A massive thank you to Revolution Race for the clothes that you know I am always wearing.
Get the same clothes here: https://bit.ly/4nkgMZw

____

My own website: http://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

I hand-craft my own cutting boards in the log cabin. I can only make a few at a time, so you have to be first to buy one when a new batch is released. They are made from hard nordic oak, making them extremely durable, holding up for a lifetime of abuse. Instead of having a plastic cutting board that really should be thrown away after 2 years.

I was told that my dream of selling handmade products wouldn’t work in today's world where everything is mass produced. I want to prove them wrong. My goal is to expand into other handmade products. Making a series of lifetime quality handmade goods. Breaking free from mass production, supporting our environment.

____

Thank you Stevie Antoniou for always editing my videos! New batch of my own cutting boards is finally available:
https://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

It’s craftsmanship I truly believe in, made with the same values I stand for. I’m proud to represent them.

Get the same pan here:
👉 https://www.kockumsjernverk.se/sv/kolstalsstekpannor/stekpanna-o28-cm

P.S. I might have added the leather belt seen in the video to my website 😉

Thank you all for watching my videos, it means the world and thank you Stevie Antoniou for helping me edit my videos!

🌳🪵 A massive thank you to Revolution Race for the clothes that you know I am always wearing.
Get the same clothes here: https://bit.ly/4nkgMZw

____

My own website: http://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

I hand-craft my own cutting boards in the log cabin. I can only make a few at a time, so you have to be first to buy one when a new batch is released. They are made from hard nordic oak, making them extremely durable, holding up for a lifetime of abuse. Instead of having a plastic cutting board that really should be thrown away after 2 years.

I was told that my dream of selling handmade products wouldn’t work in today's world where everything is mass produced. I want to prove them wrong. My goal is to expand into other handmade products. videos.title: Eat This Part of Watermelon — Your Body Will Thank You
videos.summary_source_text:
Eat This Part of Watermelon — Your Body Will Thank You Most people eat watermelon for the sweet red flesh, but they’re throwing away the most powerful part. That white rind just beneath the skin is loaded with citrulline, an amino acid that converts into arginine and boosts nitric oxide in the body. This helps open your blood vessels, improve circulation, support heart health, and naturally lower blood pressure. Watermelon is also rich in lycopene, antioxidants, and hydration that benefit your skin, metabolism, and overall health. Before you toss that rind, learn why this overlooked part of watermelon may be the key to better blood flow and a healthier body.

*********************************

Build your own AI agent in under 60 seconds. In this video, we explore how BlueStacks AI turns OpenClaw—a powerful open-source AI assistant—into a simple, one-click install with no coding required.

OpenClaw is an autonomous AI agent that can perform real-world tasks like browsing the web, managing files, and automating workflows using models like GPT, Claude, and Gemini . But traditionally, setting it up requires Docker, Node.js, and complex configuration.

That’s where BlueStacks AI changes everything.

videos.title: TOUCHDOWN IN CHI-TOWN! Hurricanes Rout the Blackhawks 7-2
videos.summary_source_text:
TOUCHDOWN IN CHI-TOWN! Hurricanes Rout the Blackhawks 7-2 The Carolina Hurricanes begin their four-game road trip with a dominating 7-2 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Thursday night. Logan Stankoven with three points, Mark Jankowski with two goals, and William Carrier with three assists. What else stood out in the win? Also, we have more awards being handed out and nominated for. On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes' rout of the Blackhawks. On a night where everyone contributed and checked off milestones, what stood out? How was it a complete dominance by the Canes with seven of their regulars out? Secondly, Zach reacts to what Rod Brind'Amour stated postgame following the win. How did the head coach feel about his team winning big, even with seven non-regulars in the lineup? Finally, Jordan Staal was awarded the Steve Chaisson Award, while Jaccob Slavin was nominated for the King Clancy Award. What does it mean for both guys? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Never Ever Rush The Puck
videos.summary_source_text:
Never Ever Rush The Puck Want to learn how to rush the puck like an NHL defensemen? This breakdown will show you exactly how to do that and the mechanics you need to find that standard.

In this video , we'll break down the three essential elements that make a successful puck rush: the pickup, initial deception, and final deception.  The first key aspect is the pickup, which involves a good head check and utilizing a Shuffle technique. By checking your surroundings and employing a Shuffle maneuver, you ensure that you have the necessary time and space to execute the rush effectively.

Once you've completed the pickup, it's time for the initial deception. Here, we introduce the use of crosses. By employing crosses immediately after the Shuffle, you create an angle that forces the defender to react and make a decision. This element sets the foundation for a successful rush.

The third and final element is the use of a soft drag or an anchor. This technique is crucial in beating the defender and advancing toward the goal. It involves a medium-speed shoulder check, followed by a Shuffle, crosses, and then executing the anchor or soft drag move.

videos.title: Sakta ner och slå ngre…
videos.channel: Bättre & Enklare golf med Marcus Edblad PGA
videos.summary_source_text:
Sakta ner och slå ngre… Vill vi öka hastigheten på klubbhuvudet kan vi inte bara öka hastigheten på allting. Vi behöver sakta ner stora delar av kroppen för att öka hastigheten där vi behöver den som bäst. #golf #golfswing #golftips 

Nu finns det möjlighet att genom appen Skillest göra mig till din personliga tränare. Du hittar mig på denna länk: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook. Vill vi öka hastigheten på klubbhuvudet kan vi inte bara öka hastigheten på allting. Vi behöver sakta ner stora delar av kroppen för att öka hastigheten där vi behöver den som bäst. #golf #golfswing #golftips

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook.
videos.summary: Sakta ner och slå ngre… Vill vi öka hastigheten på klubbhuvudet kan vi inte bara öka hastigheten på allting. Vi behöver sakta ner stora delar av kroppen för att öka hastigheten där vi behöver den som bäst.

videos.title: I Wish I Knew This Pitching Drill Years Ago | Completely Changed My Short Game
videos.summary_source_text:
I Wish I Knew This Pitching Drill Years Ago | Completely Changed My Short Game A while back Ping did research on chipping and pitching and found the best players get the club to first touch the ground within about an inch of the ball—and in my opinion that’s the #1 skill for great short game. In this video I show you my penny drill (two pennies = about that 1" window) and how I score it over 20 reps so you can actually measure progress instead of guessing. 

Then I share the counterintuitive pieces that made me way more consistent: a small weight shift instead of locking everything still, letting the club release instead of holding angles. Using a Blue Brick as a guide to keep the club more “on top” (not dragged from the inside). This is a game changer. Check it out here 🔗➡️ https://bit.ly/bluebrickgolf

The RDA for most important supplements is too low, or only represents the bare minimum requirement to avoid deficiency. You often need significantly more to create a therapeutic effect.

Vitamin D is arguably the most important vitamin for your health. Most people do not get enough, and with chronic health conditions, the need increases. Vitamin D can improve your mood, cognitive function, reduce lower back pain, and decrease the risk of cancer.

Magnesium is one of the most important minerals for your health. It is vital for vitamin D function, energy production, sleep, and more.

You need 4700 mg of potassium each day, and most people are deficient. Potassium can help support healthy blood sugar and blood pressure levels.

Many one-a-day vitamins are unnecessary. They often contain cheap, synthetic ingredients and fillers that do not benefit your health and may even make matters worse.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

videos.title: Avalanche Defeat Calgary and Lock Up the Presidents' Trophy
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Defeat Calgary and Lock Up the Presidents' Trophy Colorado Avalanche clinch the President’s Trophy with a tense win over the Calgary Flames—can MacKinnon and company carry their dominance into the Stanley Cup playoffs?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the Avalanche’s wire-to-wire season, highlighting Nathan MacKinnon’s fiery playmaking, Gabe Landeskog’s clutch moments, and Martin Necas’s growth towards a 100-point campaign. The conversation tackles the myth of the Presidents' Trophy “curse,” the high-stakes challenge for home ice advantage, Jared Bednar’s critical coaching decisions, and Mackenzie Blackwood’s strong goaltending performance. Insightful analysis covers Avalanche’s defensive improvements, their power play precision, and how recent matchup history with the Flames sets the stage for playoff intensity.

Will the Avalanche prove themselves as one of the best teams of the salary cap era? Get the inside scoop on their postseason outlook and what fans can expect as the road to Stanley comes through Denver.

videos.title: Ludvig Jansson Makes His NHL Debut with the Florida Panthers in Ottawa
videos.summary_source_text:
Ludvig Jansson Makes His NHL Debut with the Florida Panthers in Ottawa Florida Panthers rookie defenseman Ludvig Jansson meets the media before his team lost 5-1 the host Ottawa Senators on Thursday, April 9, 2026. 

The Panthers lost both Seth Jones and Dmitry Kulikov to broken bones in Tuesday’s 4-3 shootout loss in Montreal. Jones has a fracture in his foot; Kulikov broke a finger. 

Florida has lost four straight (0-3-1) and had two rookie defensemen making their NHL debut in Marek Alscher and Jansson. 

The Panthers wrap their five-game road trip with in Toronto on Saturday. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

The Panthers Have Done It Again, Repeat as Cup Champs: https://floridahockeynow.com/florida-panthers-repeat-stanley-cup-champions-2025/

Panthers Get Their New Rings. Yeah, They Nice: https://floridahockeynow.com/stanley-cup-champion-florida-panthers-get-rings-yeah-they-nice/

The Most Dangerous AI Model Ever: Mythos Try Seedance 2.0 on Higgsfield: https://higgsfield.ai/s/seedance-2-0-airevolutionx-ZMHAqe
Anthropic just unveiled Claude Mythos Preview, and this thing looks like one of the most dangerous AI models we have seen yet. According to Anthropic, Mythos is strong enough at cyber offense that releasing it broadly right now would be reckless. It reportedly found major vulnerabilities across operating systems, browsers, and critical software, including bugs that had survived for decades. So this is bigger than another benchmark win.

videos.title: Slow down and gain distance…
videos.channel: Better & Easier golf with your guide Marcus Edblad
videos.summary_source_text:
Slow down and gain distance… If we want more distance we all need to understand the mechanics that speed up the club head and not just try to speed up everything. #golftips #golfswing #golf

0:00 Intro to slow down to gain distance

Online lesson are now a possibility on Skillest: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Let me help you get an effortless golfswing with speed, distance and accuracy. I call it the circle of speed. A good release will help you to a better impact and longer drives and irons without slice and hook. How to swing a golf club need to be adjusted to your skill level and experience. 

Long and straight is the goal for everyone but it takes time. Try to focus on one thing not everything when you practise. Impact, face control and swingpath will always be the most important part to drill. We focus too much on rotation but no good golf shot will be executed just by rotating. 

We also need to understand that many myths in golf are misleading. Everything that you find on the internet isn’t true. Ben Hogan, Sam Snead are two of the legends that are often misunderstood.  To understand golf we need to take it step by step and learn every part of the swing before we move on to the next. It's like a big jigsaw puzzle that we all can figure out. 

A will never call a slice sexy but a high draw is beautiful in a very special way. Some pro's that hit draw: Rory McIroy, Xander Schauffele, Patrick Reed, Sepp Straka, Bryson Dechambeau  and many, many more. 

We shall not keep our head still, only start with the hips, look only at the ball or keep the left or right arm straight. Understand what do do with the club and let your body find the best way possible. 

This is not Rick Shiels, Saguto golf, Danny Maude, Meandmygolf, the Average Golfer, Malaska, Mark Crossfield, Alex Elliot Golf or Paige Spiranac. This is a method that anyone can learn if you give it a chance. 

If you use callaway, ping, titleist, takomo or taylor made clubs doesn’t matter you can learn to hit good golf shots. Your loft or your shaft on the club will not change but you can always get better. 

Find what inspires you. Golf basics are the same for everyone. The pga tour, longdrivers or other good golfers can all help you find better golf shots. Watch what they do instead of listed to what they say. Listen mostly to your body and figure out what you need to do to produce the same results as the pros on TV. Be careful when you watch a golf swing in slow motion. The result isn't always what the golfer is trying to do. Feel and real are seldom the same. 

We can find inspiration in a lot of things. You can find training motivation watching movies like Rocky, Tin Cup or Happy Gilmore and find mental inspiration in legends like Arnold Schwarzenegger, Hulk Hogan, Sylvester Stallone or Mike Tyson. Maybe we sometimes need to hear about crazy achievements from people like David Goggins, Jocko Willink, Ct Fletcher, Jim Rohn or Tony Robbins. 

Mike Malaska, Mike Austin, Mike Dunaway, Pete Cowen and Steve Pratt are some of my favorite golf instructors online. Find the tips that make your golf better. Decide what you want to hit. I teach a draw but many like a fade and nobody likes a hook or slice. 

Your hips or your lag is not the key to golf. Your hands will decide the shot and you can do like Tiger Woods and trust your hands. Teach your hands to hit different shots. Hit big hooks and slices to understand what happens. Only straight is not gonna teach you anything. 

Bryson Dechambeu and Kyle Birkshire can inspire you to hit it longer. Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson can give you inspiration and motivation to test new things and new golf shots. Linn Grant, Viktor Hovland and Ludvig Aberg can show you the future of golf. 

The Masters, Players Championship, The Players, The Open and US Open can make you love golf even more. See the best in the world solve all the problems we all need to master any golf course. Golf is a craft and you need fantasy, feel and skills to master it.

Questions my videos will answer:

How to swing faster. How to hit longer. How to swing faster. How to hit your irons better. How to be better at anything. How to master the circle of speed. How to get a better short game. How to hit your wedge better. How to release the golf club. How to rotate in golf. Best tips for beginner golfers. How to hit down on the ball. How to hit up on the ball. How to rotate hips in the golf swing. How to hit straight every time. How to stop slicing. How to swing effortlessly. 

#subscribe #golftips #pga  #hurricane 


Filmed with Iphone 15 pro or Iphone 17 If we want more distance we all need to understand the mechanics that speed up the club head and not just try to speed up everything. #golftips #golfswing #golf

Olive oil.
Salt. 1/2 cup (120 ml) milk.

Olive oil.

In this deep dive, we explore the entire Claude 4.6 lineup, including Sonnet 4.6, Opus 4.6, and Haiku 4.5, and explain how groundbreaking features like Agent Teams, Adaptive Thinking, Skills, and Connectors are turning AI into a coordinated digital workforce.

videos.title: Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Lose Seth Jones, 2 Make NHL Debut at Ottawa Senators
videos.summary_source_text:
Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Lose Seth Jones, 2 Make NHL Debut at Ottawa Senators Florida Panthers coach Paul Maurice meets the media before his team plays the host Ottawa Senators on Thursday, April 9, 2026. 

The Panthers lost both Seth Jones and Dmitry Kulikov to broken bones in Tuesday’s 4-3 shootout loss in Montreal. Jones has a fracture in his foot; Kulikov broke a finger. 

Florida has lost three straight and will have two rookie defensemen making their NHL debut tonight in Marek Alscher and Ludvig Jansson. 

The Panthers continue their five-game road trip with Game 3 in Ottawa on Thursday.

videos.title: The WEIRDEST Putter At The 2026 MASTERS!
videos.summary_source_text:
The WEIRDEST Putter At The 2026 MASTERS! Rick takes a closer look at the Golfyr Maker Tour Putter — one of the most unique (and expensive) putters he’s ever had in his hands. Made famous by Sergio Garcia, this isn’t your typical flatstick, and in this review Rick puts it to the test to see if the performance matches the price and the bold design.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

Feel This For Maximum Driver Distance and Consistency #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno #shorts 

How to hit driver farther and straighter starts with one thing most amateurs are missing: a free release through impact. If you're losing distance and missing weak right, this fixes it.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available! 
👉 Register Here: https://bit.ly/48bbScn 

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created 
👉 Download Here: https://inf.getswingcoach.com/EC1 

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno 
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com 

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System 
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
• Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

In This Video, You'll Learn:
• How to hit driver farther by learning the two-part release — toss and turn — that squares the face and delivers correct loft at impact
• Increase driver distance by eliminating the passive, hold-on swing pattern that robs you of club head speed and produces weak misses to the right
• Unlock how to release the golf club through a trail hand toss drill and lead arm rotation drill you can practice in minutes on the range
• Fix your golf swing with the same driver release cues Eric used with a real student to turn a weak right miss into a solid, center-fairway drive
• Apply two targeted golf drills — right hand only and left arm only — specifically designed to build driver release feel before you hit full shots
• Build the driver golf swing pattern seen in elite ball strikers: club head progressively releasing, passing the hands, and producing high, powerful drives
• Stop the weak right miss for good — the most common high handicap golfer driver problem — and start hitting it higher, farther, and straighter

Want to increase driver distance and finally fix that weak, short miss to the right? In this golf lesson, golf swing coach Eric Cogorno reveals the exact two-part release pattern — toss with the trail hand, turn with the lead arm — that the best drivers of the ball use to square the face and deliver power through impact. Most golf swing tips tell you to rotate your body harder. Eric shows you what your arms and hands actually need to do with the driver — and backs it up with golf swing analysis of real student results and PGA Tour player comparisons. Whether you're a high handicap golfer trying to keep it in play or an experienced player chasing more yards, this is the driver fix you've been looking for.

videos.title: 462. Börsen just nu: hur påverkar händelserna i Iran börsen? | Livepodd med André Granström
videos.summary_source_text:
462. Börsen just nu: hur påverkar händelserna i Iran börsen? | Livepodd med André Granström Hur ska man agera när marknaden är orolig? Vad säger forskningen? Vad kostar det att sitta med torrt krut i ladorna? Vad säger olje-, aktie-, råvaru- och räntemarknaden? Varför är det ett så stort problem med Hormuz-sundet? Hur hänger allting ihop - allt från olje till matpriserna? Ja, det är några av sakerna som jag och André Granström tog upp på vår live-podd i tisdags 7 april.

Här får du inspelningen som vi gjorde i tisdags (7 april). Även om vissa saker har vi fått facit på sedan dess - t.ex. vapenvilan mellan Iran och USA - så upplever jag att många av sakerna vi pratade om fortfarande är högst relevanta både idag och framgent.

Framförallt i den första delen pratar vi om bl.a.:

▸ Hur har det gått de senaste 12 månaderna sedan Trumps tullar
▸ Att det är normalt att börsen backar med -14% inom ett år (även de år det går plus)
▸ Sannolikheten att gå plus per sparhorisont
▸ Börsen 12 månader efter en geopolitisk händelse
▸Att nedgångar är vanliga, men stora nedgångar är ovanliga
▸ Snittavkastning 1, 3 och 5 år efter en nedgång
▸ Sannolikhet att gå plus efter en nedgång
▸ Att tajma marknaden är extremt svårt
▸ Det är dyrt att stå utanför marknaden (“Myten om torrt krut”)

I den andra delen pratar vi mer om de olika sambanden:

▸ Vad som skiljer denna oljestörning från historiska
▸ Varför Hormuz-sundet är så viktigt
▸ Påverkan på t.ex. flygbränsle, naturgas, olja, plast och insatsvaror
▸ Den stora risken ingen pratar om - spannmålspriset
▸ Att Sverige är ett av länderna med bäst skydd
▸ Hur marknaden prisar in risken (vilket visade sig vara rätt med facit i hand)

Därutöver diskuterade vi en del frågor från publiken (tack till dig som deltog!). Du får gärna ge en tumme upp eller kommentar om du vill att vi ska göra fler sådana live-inspelningar. 🙂

Hälsningar,
Jan och André

====

====
00:00:00 - Intro till avsnittet
00:05:27 - Globalfond upp 23% på ett år sedan förra Trumpkraschen
00:07:57 - Normalt att börsen faller – snittet är 14% nedgång per år

00:18:24 - Torrt krut är i praktiken marknadstiming

00:47:57 - Naturgasmarknaden: regional prissättning och LNG-flöden
00:49:57 - Regionala skillnader – Asien drabbas hårdast, USA klarar sig relativt bra
00:52:54 - Petrodollarns ställning under press 
00:55:00 - Iran tar ut passageavgifter
00:57:42 - Inflationsrisk och centralbankernas dilemma kring räntor
01:00:00 - Bolåneräntor stiger trots oförändrad styrränta
01:01:09 - Argument för och emot att centralbankerna tvingas höja
01:06:39 - Fråga från publiken: binda eller ha rörlig bolåneränta
01:09:45 - Sveriges energiposition i krisen
01:14:24 - 45 dagars oljelager i reserv
01:17:27 - Vad skulle kunna utlösa ett 70-talsliknande läge?
01:23:06 - Varför aktiemarknaden är relativt lugn trots krisens allvar
01:26:39 - Guld och råvaror
01:29:06 - Inflation är problemet, inte tillväxten
01:32:54 - Spekulationsstrategier
01:36:51 - Stockholmsbörsen: utmanande läge för småbolag
01:39:09 - SpaceX-notering och värderingen på 1,75 biljoner dollar
01:41:27 - Sammanfattning Hur ska man agera när marknaden är orolig? Vad säger forskningen? Vad kostar det att sitta med torrt krut i ladorna? Vad säger olje-, aktie-, råvaru- och räntemarknaden? Varför är det ett så stort problem med Hormuz-sundet? Hur hänger allting ihop - allt från olje till matpriserna? Ja, det är några av sakerna som jag och André Granström tog upp på vår live-podd i tisdags 7 april.

Här får du inspelningen som vi gjorde i tisdags (7 april). Även om vissa saker har vi fått facit på sedan dess - t.ex. vapenvilan mellan Iran och USA - så upplever jag att många av sakerna vi pratade om fortfarande är högst relevanta både idag och framgent.

Framförallt i den första delen pratar vi om bl.a.:

▸ Hur har det gått de senaste 12 månaderna sedan Trumps tullar
▸ Att det är normalt att börsen backar med -14% inom ett år (även de år det går plus)
▸ Sannolikheten att gå plus per sparhorisont
▸ Börsen 12 månader efter en geopolitisk händelse
▸Att nedgångar är vanliga, men stora nedgångar är ovanliga
▸ Snittavkastning 1, 3 och 5 år efter en nedgång
▸ Sannolikhet att gå plus efter en nedgång
▸ Att tajma marknaden är extremt svårt
▸ Det är dyrt att stå utanför marknaden (“Myten om torrt krut”)

I den andra delen pratar vi mer om de olika sambanden:

▸ Vad som skiljer denna oljestörning från historiska
▸ Varför Hormuz-sundet är så viktigt
▸ Påverkan på t.ex. flygbränsle, naturgas, olja, plast och insatsvaror
▸ Den stora risken ingen pratar om - spannmålspriset
▸ Att Sverige är ett av länderna med bäst skydd
▸ Hur marknaden prisar in risken (vilket visade sig vara rätt med facit i hand)

Därutöver diskuterade vi en del frågor från publiken (tack till dig som deltog!). Du får gärna ge en tumme upp eller kommentar om du vill att vi ska göra fler sådana live-inspelningar. 🙂

Hälsningar,
Jan och André

videos.title: ‪@Visa‬ x WeFi: The Future is in Stablecoin Payments Pt. 2
videos.summary_source_text:
‪@Visa‬ x WeFi: The Future is in Stablecoin Payments Pt. 2 The conversation continues. And this time, it gets into what all of this actually means for real people.
Alexandra Soroko (Growth Product & Partnerships, Visa) and Michael Batuev (Head of Global Payments, WeFi) are back for Episode 2 — going beyond infrastructure to tackle the questions driving the industry right now.

What we cover in Pt. 2:
- Does regulation help or slow adoption — and what MiCA and the GENIUS Act actually mean for the market
- Why $905 billion in annual remittances highlights exactly what stablecoins are built to fix
- Which geographies are moving fastest, and why emerging markets stand to benefit most
- How corporate use cases, from cash management to intercompany transfers, are quietly becoming a major growth frontier
- Why confidence from regulatory clarity is what brings traditional financial institutions into the stablecoin space at scale

The strongest financial innovations don't just disrupt what exists.
They make it work better for more people. Stablecoins are already enabling near-instant, low-cost cross-border settlement, without the layers of intermediaries that slow down money and drive up costs.

At WeFi, we're not watching this happen. We're building on it as the leading Deobanking infrastructure provider, working with organisations like Visa to bring stablecoins from theory into real, practical utility. Cards, accounts, global payments, and real financial services, all powered by infrastructure designed to reward the people who use it.

The story doesn't stop here. There is more to come.

🔔 Subscribe and stay tuned as we continue to bring together the industry's most important players to discuss where global payments and banking go next.

The #1 Missing Mineral Behind High Blood Pressure High blood pressure is one of the most common health problems in the world, and yet over 90% of cases are labeled “idiopathic,” meaning the cause is unknown.

For decades, people have been told to avoid salt and cut saturated fats. But what if that’s not the real issue?

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/47dS6M6 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

There’s a critical piece missing from the conversation. Magnesium and potassium play a major role in regulating blood pressure, and many people are severely deficient without realizing it. When these minerals are low, your body has a difficult time relaxing blood vessels, leading to increased pressure over time.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

videos.title: Could this FIX your putting 🤯
videos.summary_source_text:
Could this FIX your putting 🤯 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Why I’d NEVER buy a £300,000 Bentley...
videos.summary_source_text:
Why I’d NEVER buy a £300,000 Bentley... Get 20% off Car Vertical using code Carwow: https://bit.ly/Carwow-Car-Vertical

Welcome to the carwow review of the new Bentley Bentayga Speed! 

We’re putting this all-new, luxurious SUV to the test to see if it can still hold its own against the flashiest rivals on the planet, such as the Lamborghini Urus, Ferrari Purosangue, or the ultra-opulent Rolls-Royce Cullinan. 

While the Urus is a track-focused weapon and the Cullinan is a literal palace on wheels, the Bentayga Speed tries to occupy the sweet spot in the middle. But does it offer enough for you to choose it over its rivals? Let's take a closer look...

At first glance, you might think not much has changed because it shares the same iconic body, grille, and bonnet as the previous model. However, the Speed hallmarks appear upon closer inspection. To differentiate it from the standard V8, Bentley has swapped out the traditional chrome for a sleek, blacked-out trim across the exterior. This model also marks the first time you can spec massive 23” alloy wheels that fill the arches perfectly. Our test car even features the optional carbon fibre side skirts, a chunky roof spoiler, and a vocal Akrapovič exhaust system!

Bentley continues to set the bar for cabin quality, and every single element you touch feels expensive - we couldn't even find any wonky stitching! The cabin is a masterclass in textures, blending high-end Leather and Alcantara with stunning wood trim. While the digital dials look great and modern, Bentley has wisely kept physical dials for the climate control, making it far easier to use on the move than its touch-screen-only rivals. The infotainment system is also intuitive enough to ensure the tech never gets in the way of the luxury.

The biggest news for the new Bentayga Speed is under the bonnet, where the legendary 6-litre W12 has been replaced by a downsized 4-litre V8. Interestingly, Bentley has avoided adding any hybrid power here, keeping it as a pure internal combustion engine producing 650hp and 850Nm of torque. Even though it has lost four cylinders, it has not lost its punch. It is now lighter over the front end, making it feel more agile than ever, while the Akrapovič exhaust ensures it sounds just as mean as the old twelve-cylinder.

All of this luxury comes with a high price tag. While the standard Bentayga starts at £172,600, the Speed model featured in this video comes in at a cool £290,295 thanks to a staggering £70,000 worth of options! But is it the smart choice over its close rivals? Stick around and see for yourself!

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0904

Aston Martin DBX review: https://bit.ly/Aston-Martin-DBX-0904

Bentley Flying Spur review: https://bit.ly/Bentley-Flying-Spur-0904

videos.title: 4 TO GO IN CHICAGO! Carolina Hurricanes Start 4-Game Road Trip Against the Blackhawks
videos.summary_source_text:
4 TO GO IN CHICAGO! Carolina Hurricanes Start 4-Game Road Trip Against the Blackhawks The Carolina Hurricanes begin their four-game road trip to finish off the regular season against the Chicago Blackhawks. Can they keep the winning ways going as they are still in pursuit of the number one seed in the Eastern Conference? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes calling up four players from the Chicago Wolves ahead of their game against the Blackhawks. Since the AHL club is close by, why does it make sense to call up some of their younger players to give veterans some rest? What could the lines look like on Thursday night that'll include the call-ups? Secondly, Zach goes over the tale of the tape between the two sides. Who has the edge? What could the potential goalie matchup be in Chicago? Finally, Zach picks his Canes to Click as a scorer against the Blackhawks. Who could it be? He will share his thoughts on what fans should expect with four games remaining before the playoffs. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Avalanche First Round Preferences. What Are the Good / Bad Matchups?
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche First Round Preferences. What Are the Good / Bad Matchups? Colorado Avalanche await their wild card opponent as the Western Conference playoff race heats up. With the Nashville Predators, Los Angeles Kings, San Jose Sharks, and Winnipeg Jets in contention, which matchup would give Nathan MacKinnon and Cale Makar the smoothest path forward—or present a surprising first-round hurdle?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the strengths and weaknesses of each wild card contender, from the Kings’ overtime struggles to the Sharks’ high-scoring youth. The hosts dissect Colorado’s favorable records against potential rivals, analyze key playoff metrics like regulation wins, and debate which team poses the toughest challenge—will Connor Hellebuyck and the Jets’ defensive grit disrupt the Avs’ Stanley Cup quest? 

Plus, discussion turns to Gabriel Landeskog’s Bill Masterton Award nomination and what it means for the Avalanche captain’s inspiring comeback. Don’t miss the pulse on the Avs’ playoff outlook and postseason preferences.

videos.summary_source_text:
Google New JITRO Crosses A Dangerous Line 👉 Try Kling 3.0 on Higgsfield: https://higgsfield.ai/s/kling-3-0-motion-control-airevolutionx-KTbSqU
Google is reportedly building a next-gen coding agent called Jitro that moves beyond prompt-based coding and starts working toward higher-level goals. OpenAI is quietly testing Image V2 with much stronger text and UI generation, Anthropic just introduced Claude Mythos Preview with serious cybersecurity capabilities, and Z.ai dropped GLM 5.1, an open model built for long-horizon engineering work that keeps improving across extended runs.

videos.title: This is What Separates Amateurs From Professionals
videos.summary_source_text:
This is What Separates Amateurs From Professionals The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.summary_source_text:
This SHOCKED me...Graphite v Steel Shaft Test This SHOCKED me… I tested graphite vs steel shafts to see which actually performs better and the results were not what I expected.

In this video, I put both shafts head-to-head to compare:

Distance
Accuracy
Ball flight
Feel & consistency

Most golfers think they know which shaft is best… but after this test, you might completely rethink your setup.If you’re trying to gain distance, tighten dispersion, or finally understand which shaft suits your swing this is a must-watch.

Inside this video:

Real on-course / launch monitor data
Honest performance breakdown
Who should use graphite vs steel
Common mistakes golfers make when choosing shafts

videos.title: Claude Managed Agents: OpenClaw Is In Trouble

Claude Managed Agents: OpenClaw Is In Trouble Anthropic just dropped Claude Managed Agents and I think this is why they killed OpenClaw's Claude access. I've been running AI agents on my own servers for months - health coaches, social media bots, crypto agents - all on OpenClaw  with a whole DIY stack. Today I tried rebuilding my Oura Ring health agent using Managed Agents and it took minutes instead of days. Secure sandboxing, long running sessions, multi agent coordination, full tracing... all built in. But can it fully replace OpenClaw? I found one big catch. Watch to find out.

videos.title: Why You Miss Your Irons Left and Right
videos.summary_source_text:
Why You Miss Your Irons Left and Right Stop guessing what to work on in your golf game. Build your Personal Game Plan with Me and My Golf  👉 https://meandmygolf.com/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=08.04.26

Tom’s swing actually looked really good.
Good path. On plane. Solid motion.
But he was missing his irons left… then right… and had no idea why.
In this live lesson, we break down the real reason golfers struggle with inconsistent iron direction — and it’s not what most people think.
The issue wasn’t his swing path.
It was his clubface.
With one simple grip adjustment, we eliminated the left miss immediately, made his ball flight predictable, and then rebuilt his release to turn pushes into controlled draws.
If you:
•⁠  ⁠Miss your irons both ways
•⁠  ⁠Fight a pull or hook
•⁠  ⁠Feel like your swing is close but your direction isn’t
This lesson will show you what to check first.

videos.title: Rikast i kommunen-listorna är här - ska man tänka på något?
videos.summary_source_text:
Rikast i kommunen-listorna är här - ska man tänka på något? Rikast i kommunen-listorna är här 

 Jag vet att i communityn så kan detta ibland upplevas lite obehagligt. Särskilt om man bor i en mindre ort och man är med på en sån här lista. 

Därför vill jag bara skicka med lugnande besked att dessa artiklar sällan skapar någon hotbild eftersom alla dessa uppgifter är offentliga sedan tidigare (tidigare års taxering)

Om du vill fördjupa dig i det här rekommenderar jag avsnitt 432 och 433 där vi pratar med en säkerhetsexpert om bland annat “rikaste i kommunen” artiklar och mycket mer. Rikast i kommunen-listorna är här

videos.title: I Played the Most DANGEROUS Golf Course in the World!
videos.summary_source_text:
I Played the Most DANGEROUS Golf Course in the World! Rick Shiels plays Skukuza Golf Course deep inside South Africa's Kruger National Park — where hippos, lions, elephants and giraffes roam freely across the fairways. There are no fences, no barriers, and absolutely no guarantee you'll finish your round without a close encounter. This might be the most incredible and terrifying round of golf ever filmed.

Sign up to Creator Golf Club here: https://www.creatorgolfclub.com/?utm_source=rickshiels&utm_medium=yt

Check out Kruger Golf Safaris here: https://www.krugergolfsafaris.com

Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

LIMITED EDITION MERCH (UK & US)

UK viewers: https://uk.rickshiels.com
US viewers: https://us.rickshiels.com

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.
