videos.title: Alex Noren & Marco Penge: Augusta Insights & Preparing for a First Masters
videos.summary_source_text:
Alex Noren & Marco Penge: Augusta Insights & Preparing for a First Masters Alex Noren and Marco Penge join George Harper Jr. in Kentucky at the home of Buffalo Trace for a special edition of the Life on Tour podcast, presented by Buffalo Trace.

With The Masters just around the corner, both players look ahead to Augusta National in what promises to be one of the most exciting weeks in golf. Alex draws on his experience from four previous appearances, sharing insights into what makes the course so unique, the challenges it presents, and what it really feels like to compete on one of the game’s biggest stages.

Marco, preparing for his first Masters, opens up about the excitement of making his debut. From anticipation to nerves, he discusses what it means to earn his place in the field and the emotions of stepping onto such an iconic course for the very first time.

videos.title: OpenAI Just Made History (Holy Sh*t?!)
videos.summary_source_text:
OpenAI Just Made History (Holy Sh*t?!) OpenAI just made history with the largest raise by any company ever. 

They recently raised $122 billion at a staggering $852 billion valuation, reportedly generating $2 billion in revenue every month.

At the same time, reports revealed that Sora was losing roughly $1 million per day—totaling over a third of a billion dollars—before it was shut down a couple weeks ago.

These two pieces of news coming out at the same time is kind of giving me whiplash, but I'm also not surprised by either. 

To stay up-to-date with all the latest AI news each week, check out my latest YouTube video for more!

videos.summary_source_text:
Your Tight Muscles May Not Need More Stretching If stretching only gives temporary relief, the problem may not be your muscles.
 In this video, I explore why tightness is often not just a muscle issue, but a nervous system pattern of protection — and why pushing harder, stretching more, or forcing change often does not create lasting ease.
Instead, I guide you through a gentle awareness-based exploration so you can begin sensing tightness in a different way.
If you’d like to go deeper into this work, here’s my free somatic masterclass:
Free Somatic Masterclass — Move More Freely in Your Body
Watch here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

videos.summary_source_text:
DRINK 1 CUP A DAY to Unclog Your Arteries This artery cleansing drink is like exercise in a cup! Unclog arteries and support cardiovascular health with one cup of this amazing drink daily. Reverse arterial plaque and prevent a heart attack naturally!

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Get Dr.Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/488xOUn

Want to improve cardiovascular health naturally and effectively? Watch these videos next:
▶️ https://youtu.be/fqwrf0RvOVI
▶️ https://youtu.be/HLrMpB5Bgtk
▶️ https://youtu.be/AtBElcAs6H0

0:00 Introduction: How to unclog arteries naturally
0:33 What causes clogged arteries?
2:21 How to increase nitric oxide
3:00 How to reverse clogged arteries
8:35 The best drink to unclog arteries
10:33 More cacao benefits  

If you have damage to your arteries, you’re at an increased risk for high blood pressure and clots, which can cause strokes and heart attacks. When you visit the doctor for these conditions, they typically address the symptoms rather than examining the root cause.

The root cause of plaque in the arteries is endothelial damage. Endothelial damage and inflammation are repaired by plaque, composed of calcium, cholesterol, and protein.

Arterial damage decreases nitric oxide levels, resulting in less control over blood pressure and an increased risk of clotting. Around 90% of heart attacks come from clots!

Sunlight is vital to increase nitric oxide. Nasal breathing and magnesium are also essential.

You can reverse arterial plaque buildup through a process called reverse cholesterol transport. This mechanism transports plaque in the arteries back to the liver for recycling. This process can be sped up with the help of the following:
•Niacin  
•HDL cholesterol
•Exercise 
•Fasting 
•Low-carb diets 
•Bile salts 

Magnesium controls calcium, so increasing your intake can help to remove it from the arteries. Polyphenols protect the endothelial layer of the arteries, and vitamin K2 helps prevent arterial calcification.  
 
Cacao powder is the main component of the best drink for your arteries. It’s high in flavonols and stimulates enzymes in the body to produce more nitric oxide. Roasted cacao has been shown to increase blood flow to the arteries, similar to the effects of exercise.

Cacao is also beneficial for your heart, brain, skin, and other organs and tissues in the body. It has an accumulative effect and can build up in your system over time. 

To prepare your drink, combine cacao powder in a glass of water. You can drink it cold or warm. Add beetroot juice powder for an additional boost of nitric oxide and an interesting flavor. You can also add a pinch of sea salt and a scoop of magnesium glycinate for the most potent effect! 

DATA:

videos.title: Hot vs Cold Shower: Which One Should You ACTUALLY Take?
videos.summary_source_text:
Hot vs Cold Shower: Which One Should You ACTUALLY Take? Which is better for recovery, a cold shower or a hot one? In this video, we’ll compare cold vs. hot shower recovery after a workout to see how they stack up. I’ll also share the best recovery method after a workout that many people don’t know about!

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

DNA TEST LINK (USA ONLY): https://3x4genetics.com/DRBERG-PDF
Use access code [DRBERG-PDF] to receive your complimentary PDF report.

0:00 Introduction: Cold shower vs. hot shower for muscle recovery
0:20 Cold shower benefits 
1:02 Hot shower benefits 
1:26 Natural muscle recovery tips 
2:20 The best recovery method after a workout
5:33 Enhancing muscle recovery 

👉 Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/3Q9eP61

Keep watching for more ways to boost energy, improve recovery, and support your overall health:
▶️ https://youtu.be/vWrzH4IBs-Q
▶️ https://youtu.be/xpU4JrUgqMw
▶️ https://youtu.be/O1zKV3eqevc

Today, we’re going to compare cold showers vs. hot showers for muscle recovery. Surprisingly, cold therapy can slow down the benefits of exercise! In cases of overtraining, swelling, or pain, cold therapy can be beneficial. 

While cold therapy may not be the best for muscle recovery, there are many cold shower benefits, such as improved cognitive and immune function. 

Hot showers provide more muscle relaxation, blood flow, and oxygen. They relax the parasympathetic nervous system and can improve sleep quality by 20%. A hot shower is a better option for a muscle recovery shower. 

For both cold water and hot shower benefits, you can do both! This creates vasoconstriction followed by vasodilation, increasing blood flow to your muscles. 

Here are some great ways to enhance muscle recovery:
•Sauna followed by cold immersion therapy
•Foam roller 10 minutes after exercise 
•Get 8 hours of sleep
•Test DNA for optimal exercise and recovery plan  

Intermittent hypoxic training is one of the best things you can do for muscle recovery. This type of training involves restricting oxygen flow by using an air restriction mask or holding your breath. 

Intermittent hypoxic training mimics the effects of endurance training! It’s performed by elite athletes worldwide. It mimics a high-altitude environment, strengthens the metabolism, enhances muscle growth, and decreases inflammation. It also increases growth hormone, which has fat-burning, anti-aging, and muscle-building properties.

videos.summary_source_text:
Give Me Just 13 Minutes And I'll Save You Years Of Bad Golf With Your Driver How to hit driver farther and straighter starts with one thing most amateurs are missing: a free release through impact. If you're losing distance and missing weak right, this fixes it.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available!

⏰ TIMESTAMPS: 
🏌️ 0:00 Why Your Driver Keeps Going Weak and Right — and How to Fix It 
⚡ 0:29 The "Toss and Turn" Driver Release Framework Explained 
🎯 0:58 Why an Open Club Face Is Killing Your Driver Distance 
💥 1:28 The Trail Hand Toss: The Key to Squaring Your Driver at Impact 
🔥 3:23 Right Hand Only Drill — 3 Reps to Feel the Driver Release 
⛳ 5:38 How to Use Ball Flight to Self-Diagnose Your Driver Problems 
✅ 6:03 Lead Arm Rotation: The Second Move That Adds Driver Distance 
🏆 7:55 Left Arm Only Drill — Groove the Turn for a More Powerful Driver 
🚀 9:17 Combining Toss and Turn for Maximum Driver Distance and Consistency 
💪 11:03 Why Letting the Club Head Release Is the Secret to Hitting Driver Farther

In This Video, You'll Learn:
• How to hit driver farther by learning the two-part release — toss and turn — that squares the face and delivers correct loft at impact
• Increase driver distance by eliminating the passive, hold-on swing pattern that robs you of club head speed and produces weak misses to the right
• Unlock how to release the golf club through a trail hand toss drill and lead arm rotation drill you can practice in minutes on the range
• Fix your golf swing with the same driver release cues Eric used with a real student to turn a weak right miss into a solid, center-fairway drive
• Apply two targeted golf drills — right hand only and left arm only — specifically designed to build driver release feel before you hit full shots
• Build the driver golf swing pattern seen in elite ball strikers: club head progressively releasing, passing the hands, and producing high, powerful drives
• Stop the weak right miss for good — the most common high handicap golfer driver problem — and start hitting it higher, farther, and straighter

Want to increase driver distance and finally fix that weak, short miss to the right? In this golf lesson, golf swing coach Eric Cogorno reveals the exact two-part release pattern — toss with the trail hand, turn with the lead arm — that the best drivers of the ball use to square the face and deliver power through impact. Most golf swing tips tell you to rotate your body harder. Eric shows you what your arms and hands actually need to do with the driver — and backs it up with golf swing analysis of real student results and PGA Tour player comparisons. Whether you're a high handicap golfer trying to keep it in play or an experienced player chasing more yards, this is the driver fix you've been looking for.

videos.title: Doriane Pin: F1 Academy Champion, Still Pushing | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Doriane Pin: F1 Academy Champion, Still Pushing | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast From the first time she sat in a kart, aged 9, Doriane Pin has wanted to race in Formula 1. F1 Academy champion, Mercedes Development Driver, poised to drive an F1 car for the first time - Doriane is getting closer and closer to that dream.

Doriane tells Tom Clarkson her racing story so far, from feeling like a 'superhero' in her kart, to seeking sponsors at the age of 11, taking on the Le Mans 24 hours, and being spotted by the Mercedes Junior Programme.

In F1 Academy, Doriane switched to racing open wheel cars on Grand Prix circuits, supported by Mercedes teammates Lewis Hamilton, George Russell and Kimi Antonelli. Susie Wolff's advice helped her score points in every race, and become champion at the end of her second season.

Now Doriane is Development Driver for Mercedes and is preparing for a first F1 test. Her dream remains the same: a seat on the Grand Prix grid.

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: METROPOLITAN DIVISION CHAMPIONS! Carolina Hurricanes Clinch 4th Overall Division Title in 6 Seasons
videos.summary_source_text:
METROPOLITAN DIVISION CHAMPIONS! Carolina Hurricanes Clinch 4th Overall Division Title in 6 Seasons The Carolina Hurricanes claim their fourth division title in the last six seasons after defeating the Boston Bruins 6-5 in overtime. What does it mean now with four games remaining? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes' fourth division title in six seasons, their third Metropolitan Division title in that span. Plus, the Hurricanes' fourth 50-win season in the last five seasons. Also, we talk about the standout milestones on the night as well, from Staal to Blake to Bussi and more. Secondly, Zach reacts to what Jaccob Slavin said postgame after getting his first goal of the season, coming as the GWG in overtime. What does it mean for Slavin and the Hurricanes in their last home regular-season game of the year? Finally, Zach reacts to what Rod Brind'Amour said postgame. How did the coach feel as his team won another title under his tenure? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Avalanche Lock Up the #1 Spot in the West. How Serious Is the Kadri Injury?
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Lock Up the #1 Spot in the West. How Serious Is the Kadri Injury? The Colorado Avalanche lock up the top seed in the Western Conference, getting revenge on the St. Louis Blues and setting the stage for a playoff run with home-ice advantage. Can Nathan MacKinnon and Valeri Nichushkin power the Avs to even greater heights as the President’s Trophy comes into reach?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Colorado’s bounce-back win, highlighting Scott Wedgewood’s strong night in net, key adjustments after recent struggles, and the importance of defensive discipline. Discussion covers Valeri Nichushkin’s offensive spark, injury scares for Nazem Kadri and Wedgewood, and what the Avalanche must do to maintain momentum down the stretch. Get the latest insights on player returns, locker room mentality, and the pressing question—will the Avalanche’s resilience make them the hardest team to eliminate in the Stanley Cup Playoffs?

videos.title: Paul Maurice, Panthers Postgame: Florida Loses Late Lead, Kulikov in SO Loss to Montreal Canadiens
videos.summary_source_text:
Paul Maurice, Panthers Postgame: Florida Loses Late Lead, Kulikov in SO Loss to Montreal Canadiens Florida Panthers coach Paul Maurice meets the media after his team lost 4-3 in a shootout to the host Montreal Canadiens on Tuesday, April 7, 2026. 

The Panthers were swept in their weekend Pittsburgh series by a total of 14-6 but had a lead here until Nick Suzuki scored with 20.1 seconds left. 

Florida also lost defenseman Dmitry Kulikov to a broken finger. 

The Panthers got goals from Carter Verhaeghe, Cole Reinhardt, and Eetu Luostarinen with Daniil Tarasov getting another start in net.

Florida was without Matthew Tkachuk after he returned to South Florida for the birth of his first child.

The Panthers continue their five-game road trip with Game 3 in Ottawa on Thursday. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.summary_source_text:
3 Different Shots to Play From the Bunker #golfswing #golftips Most golfers can get the ball out of the bunker — but not with the control they want.
This video shows you three bunker shot levels: get it out, get it controlled, and get it spinning.
It all comes down to your entry point — where the club first enters the sand.
Start experimenting with how close to the ball you strike the sand to control spin, rollout, and stopping power.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. Most golfers can get the ball out of the bunker — but not with the control they want.

videos.title: A Simple Way to Break Sugar Cravings
videos.summary_source_text:
A Simple Way to Break Sugar Cravings Cravings can feel overwhelming, but they often start as simple thoughts. When those thoughts are observed instead of acted on, space is created to choose a different response. Over time, this shift in awareness makes it easier to step away from habits like sugar and constant snacking. Silence becomes a tool, helping separate the urge from the action and restoring control.

videos.title: OpenAI Just Dropped The Real Plan After AGI Hits
videos.summary_source_text:
OpenAI Just Dropped The Real Plan After AGI Hits OpenAI just dropped a policy blueprint built around one huge idea: superintelligence could hit hard enough to force a whole new social contract. At the same time, OpenAI closed a massive funding round, pushed its AGI vision even harder, expanded its platform ambitions, bought TBPN, and got dragged into a lawsuit over ChatGPT allegedly acting like a lawyer. This story is about way more than one paper. It is about OpenAI trying to shape the rules, the infrastructure, the products, and the public narrative before AGI disruption fully hits.

videos.title: Goal Scoring Cheat Code
videos.summary_source_text:
Goal Scoring Cheat Code The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.summary_source_text:
Golf Grip Fitting - Everything You Need To Know! What really happened when I changed my grips?

Today’s video follows up on exact feedback to my Jumbo Max fitting.

I was fortunate to go through the process at The Trott Shop and talk to two of the best guys in the business when it comes to grip fittings. John Mazzanoble & Alex Trujillo.

BUT tendencies can’t be ignored and sometimes although we want to change it is diminishing to our game. As a golfer we have a certain perception of feel and comfort so when you move away from what you deem as “ right for you “ it can be quite the adjustment.

Jumbo Max is a journey, I think we can all learn from my fitting and I think the key takeaway is baby steps when it comes to making changes.

Remember the grip is the contact point with the club, be sure to take some time and get fit for this particular area. 

As always #comment with any questions and be sure to hit #subscibe for more equipment vids.

In this video, we reveal the real #1 skin destroyer hiding in your everyday diet, something you probably eat every single day without even realizing the damage it’s causing.

2 eggs.
1 cup (240 ml) plant-based milk of your choice.
1 cup (120 g) rolled oats.
Salt.
1 apple.
1/2 cup (50 g) walnuts.
1 cup (120 g) rolled oats.
Olive oil.
Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for about 40-45 minutes.

videos.title: I Wasted 6 Months Learning This…Here’s the 8-Minute Fix
videos.summary_source_text:
I Wasted 6 Months Learning This…Here’s the 8-Minute Fix I spent 6 months trying to improve my golf game, testing different swing thoughts, drills and fixes. While I did manage to drop 3 shots off my handicap, it took far longer than it should have.

In this video, I break down the exact thing that made the biggest difference. The best part is you can learn it in just 8 minutes.

This change did not just affect one part of my game. It improved my irons, driver, chipping and putting, and that is why it had such a big impact on my scores.

Whether you are struggling with consistency, slicing the ball or simply want to lower your scores faster, this is the shortcut I wish I had from day one.

This is not about overcomplicating your swing. It is about focusing on what actually moves the needle. If you apply this properly, you will start to see improvements in your ball striking, control and overall confidence on the course.

What you will learn

The key mistake that cost me months of progress
The simple fix that changed everything
How to apply it instantly to your own game
Why most golfers are practicing the wrong way

If you are serious about improving your golf game and breaking through scoring barriers like 100, 90 or 80, this is a must watch.

Book an online lesson with me - https://skillest.com/@AlexElliott

In this video, I reveal a simple setup tweak just 5 inches behind the ball that completely changed my driver. This one move helped me add distance, improve strike, and gain more consistency off the tee.

This is part of my journey to DP World Tour Q-School, where every shot matter and this is one of the key chipping techniques I’m relying on under pressure.

videos.title: Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Without Tkachuk in Montreal (For a Very Good Reason)
videos.summary_source_text:
Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Without Tkachuk in Montreal (For a Very Good Reason) Florida Panthers coach Paul Maurice meets the media before his team plays the host Montreal Canadiens on Tuesday, April 7, 2026. 

The Panthers were swept in their weekend Pittsburgh series by a total of 14-6. 

With the loss Saturday, the two-time defending Stanley Cup champs were officially eliminated from the postseason. 

On Sunday, the Panthers got goals by Cole Schwindt and Carter Verhaeghe. 

Daniil Tarasov started the second game after playing the second half of Saturday’s game. He will play again tonight against the Canadiens.

Florida will be without Matthew Tkachuk after he returned to South Florida for the birth of his first child.

The Panthers continues their five-game road trip with the final three in Canada starting Tuesday in Montreal.

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

The Panthers Have Done It Again, Repeat as Cup Champs: https://floridahockeynow.com/florida-panthers-repeat-stanley-cup-champions-2025/

Panthers Get Their New Rings. Yeah, They Nice: https://floridahockeynow.com/stanley-cup-champion-florida-panthers-get-rings-yeah-they-nice/

videos.summary_source_text:

Movement ≠ momentum.

If nothing is compounding, you’re building in the wrong order.
You don’t need more tools — you need the right sequence.

Follow for more.

videos.title: Mackie Samoskevich, Florida Panthers Morning Skate at Montreal Canadiens
videos.summary_source_text:
Mackie Samoskevich, Florida Panthers Morning Skate at Montreal Canadiens Florida Panthers forward Mackie Samoskevich meets the media before his team plays the host Montreal Canadiens on Tuesday, April 7, 2026. 

The Panthers were swept in their weekend Pittsburgh series by a total of 14-6. 

With the loss Saturday, the two-time defending Stanley Cup champs were officially eliminated from the postseason. 

On Sunday, the Panthers got goals by Cole Schwindt and Carter Verhaeghe. 

Daniil Tarasov started the second game after playing the second half of Saturday’s game. He will play again tonight against the Canadiens.

Florida will be without Matthew Tkachuk after he returned to South Florida for the birth of his first child.

The Panthers continues their five-game road trip with the final three in Canada starting Tuesday in Montreal.

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: Do ALL golfers need this 🤔
videos.summary_source_text:
Do ALL golfers need this 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: How Far You SHOULD Hit Every Golf Club (Amateur vs Pro Data)
videos.summary_source_text:
How Far You SHOULD Hit Every Golf Club (Amateur vs Pro Data) How far you should hit every golf club is the #1 question golfers ask when trying to lower their handicap. In this video, I analyse millions of data points from Arccos Golf and PGA ShotLink to show you the massive distance gaps between amateurs and tour pros. 

You’ll learn why your 7-iron distance is lagging and why your wedge play is costing you shots due to poor launch angle and dynamic loft. Whether you are looking for driver distance tips or a golf club distance chart, this breakdown will help you understand the average golf club distances for your skill level and how to "deloft" the club like a pro for maximum "pop" off the face.

videos.title: Rivals & Stars Of The F1 Season So Far | F1 Nation Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Rivals & Stars Of The F1 Season So Far | F1 Nation Podcast Tom Clarkson is joined by former F1 driver, Jolyon Palmer, and IndyCar race winner, James Hinchcliffe, to look back on what we’ve learned from the first three races of the season and what we can expect from Miami onwards.

The guys discuss the battle between George Russell and Kimi Antonelli at Mercedes, why Oscar Piastri and McLaren were better in Japan, and what they and Ferrari need to do to catch Mercedes.

Red Bull Racing find themselves in the midfield battle, so will they regret their decision to not switch full focus to 2026 when Laurent Mekies joined as Team Principal last season? Could Max Verstappen’s frustration benefit his teammate, Isack Hadjar? And with Haas and Alpine above Red Bull in the Constructors’ Standings, is it clear who the fourth fastest team on the grid is?

Plus, Hinch thinks Fernando Alonso is the most positive person at Aston Martin right now, Tom suggests a somewhat contentious reason why, and Jolyon isn’t having any of it!

Every app I connect to my AI agents needs its own API key, its own OAuth flow, its own config. I've got 15 integrations duct taped together and it's getting ridiculous. So I tested the Zapier SDK. Why I WON’T recommend these cars anymore... Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0704

Is this the ultimate electric SUV showdown? Mat’s back, and this time he’s brought the heavy hitters of the luxury EV world.

In this video, we’re pitting the established BMW iX against its newest, most formidable rivals. We have the boxy and brilliant Kia EV9, its sleek and sophisticated sibling, the Hyundai Ioniq 9, the ultra-minimalist Polestar 3, and the safety-focused Volvo EX90.

Which of these high-tech EVs offers the best range, the most luxury, and the best value for your money? Let’s find out!

The Contenders - Specs for the cars in this video:

- BMW iX: 109kWh battery, 403 miles range,  £75,405, 544hp (Dual Motor)

- Polestar 3: 107kWh battery, 438 miles range, £69,990, 300hp (Single Motor)

- Volvo EX90: 107kWh battery, 375 miles range, £73,160, 408hp (Dual Motor)

- Hyundai Ioniq 9: 106kWh battery, 372 miles range, £64,995, 427hp (Dual Motor)

- Kia EV9: 96kWh battery, 313 miles range, £66,035, 385hp (Dual Motor)

So what’s in this review?
- Design: From the bold BMW grille to the Ioniq’s "Aerosthetic" curves.
- Interior & Tech: Which cabin feels the most premium, and which infotainment system actually works?
- Practicality: We test the 7-seater capacity of the Kia, Hyundai, and Volvo versus the 5-seat luxury of the Polestar and BMW.
- Driving: Does a 2.5-tonne SUV have any right to be fast? (Spoiler: Yes).
- The Verdict: Which one should you buy, avoid, or lease?

So which EV SUV do you think will come out on top? Drop your guess in the comments, then join Mat for this group test!

videos.title: The Ugly Truth About Avocados (You Won’t Like It)
videos.summary_source_text:
The Ugly Truth About Avocados (You Won’t Like It) Avocados are touted as a superfood, but are avocados a scam? Is avocado oil a healthy choice? Learn more about avocado nutritional deception and why you’ll need to do more than just read the labels on avocado oil.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Get Dr.Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4bOocPJ

0:00 Introduction: The avocado health fraud
0:37 Is avocado oil healthy? 
1:38 Fake avocado oil US
2:05 The avocado oil scam
3:13 Rancid avocado oil
3:47 Guacamole 
4:20 What is the best avocado oil? 
4:49 Which avocados are best?
5:22 Are avocados a scam?

DATA:
https://www.ucdavis.edu/food/news/study-finds-82-percent-avocado-oil-rancid-or-mixed-other-oils
https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0956713520302449

Learn more about reading labels with this FREE resource: https://drbrg.co/3J951Wj 

Discover the real consequences of seed oils here: https://drbrg.co/4mc4jpU

Today, we’re going to investigate the truth about avocados, avocado oil, and your health. When avocados arrive at the grocery store, they’re often put into a gas chamber and artificially ripened with ethylene gas. The artificial ripening process leaves this superfood devoid of phytonutrients. 

One research study evaluated 22 different brands of avocado oil and discovered that many products were oxidized, which can cause inflammation. Surprisingly, many products were actually fake avocado oil, mainly composed of soy and canola oils.

Approximately 82% of avocado oil is not what it says it is! In the US, there are no official rules on avocado oil or a legally binding definition of the avocado oil extraction process. This has opened the door for corruption.

Some avocado oil products contain no avocado oil at all! The origins of your avocado oil can also be misleading. A product can be labeled “product of the US”, but grown and blended elsewhere, as long as the final product is bottled in the US. 

Avocado oil doesn’t always have an expiration or production date, making it difficult to determine how long it’s been sitting on the shelf.

Fast food guacamole does not contain much avocado. It’s often replaced with green peas, hydrogenated oils, and food starches. Cosmetics also claim to use avocado oil, yet soy, palm, and mineral oils are usually listed first on the ingredient list. 

If you want to buy avocado oil, look for the following:
•Dark, glass bottle 
•Expiration date 
•Avoid the cheapest brand
•Look for the harvest date
•Look for green-colored oil
 
When choosing avocados, look for Californian varieties, such as the Hass variety. Avoid the cheaper, shiny, bagged varieties. 

Avocados can be an incredibly healthy food if you choose the right ones. They contain healthy fats, minimal omega-6 fats, and are a rich source of potassium and magnesium.

videos.title: Battling the B's! Carolina Hurricanes Face the Bruins in the Last Regular Season Home Game
videos.summary_source_text:
Battling the B's! Carolina Hurricanes Face the Bruins in the Last Regular Season Home Game The Carolina Hurricanes take on the Boston Bruins on Tuesday night for the last regular-season home game of 2025-26. While the season series is tied, who will win it in the rubber match? Who could be in the net for the Hurricanes? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing three storylines to watch for in the game against the Bruins on Tuesday night. Can the Hurricanes' penalty kill turn it around after going 0-for-2 on Sunday, and can the power play stay red hot? Will we see more milestones be reached against the Bruins, i.e., Seth Jarvis 34 goals on the season and Brandon Bussi getting win No. 30? Secondly, what could the goalie matchups look like for the Hurricanes and Bruins? Which makes the most sense with five games remaining before the playoffs? Finally, Zach concludes the show by picking his Canes to Click on Tuesday night and which players fans should keep an eye on. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

NHL Without a Map – Season 14, Jakso 10: Alivoimaninja Joel Armia Tässä jaksossa vieraillaan mm. Hollywoodin ikonisen Griffith Observatory maisemissa ja hypätään mukaan NHL-tunnelmaan legendaarisella Crypto.com areenalla. ️ Jakson pääosassa: Suomalainen NHL-hyökkääjä Joel Armia – mies, joka tunnetaan yhtenä liigan parhaista alivoimapelaajista. Mitä jaksossa luvassa: 
* Eksklusiivinen haastattelu Manhattan Beachillä 
* Miten taitoniekasta tuli alivoiman erikoismies? 
* Elämää Los Angelesissa – surffit, sää ja arki NHL-pelaajana 
* Ensimmäistä kertaa Kingsin peliin median edustajina 
* Suomalaispelaajien otteet: Armia & Samuel Helenius vs. Ottawa Senators 
* Pelin jälkeisessä hikihaastattelussa Samuel Helenius 

Lisäksi käydään fiilistelemässä Hollywoodin meininkiä Universal Studios-teemapuistossa Mukana myös: 
* Yleisökysymyksiä 
* Tarinoita pukukopista 
* Ja tietenkin: mitä Joel Armia toisi Porista? 

Tämä jakso on täynnä huumoria, NHL-kulissien taikaa ja suomalaista kiekko-osaamista maailman huipulla. 
***
Veikkaus Vetojen kanava tarjoaa sisältöä urheilun ja pelaamisen ystäville - tiukkaa asiaa ja asiantuntemusta ja kevyttä viihdettä - juuri sinulle.

videos.title: Anthropic Just Killed My AI Agent Stack
videos.summary_source_text: Anthropic Just Killed My AI Agent Stack Last week I had unlimited Claude Opus 4.6 intelligence powering my entire AI agent stack… health coach, YouTube monitoring, social media, X accounts all through OpenClaw. Then Anthropic pulled OAuth support and it all came crashing down. I've been split-testing every frontier model (Gemini, Grok, GPT, open source, Chinese models) and NOTHING comes close to Claude Opus 4.6. So where do we go from here? Drop your thoughts in the comments 👇 Last week I had unlimited Claude Opus 4.6 intelligence powering my entire AI agent stack… health coach, YouTube monitoring, social media, X accounts all through OpenClaw. Then Anthropic pulled OAuth support and it all came crashing down. I've been split-testing every frontier model (Gemini, Grok, GPT, open source, Chinese models) and NOTHING comes close to Claude Opus 4.6. So where do we go from here? Drop your thoughts in the comments 👇
